summary: Frontend regression iteration 10 for Thompson Square Medical Centre. Verified doctor card image framing/height/object-position, removal of 'Areas of Expertise' block, updated clinic hours, and email change to Medicalcentre@thompsonderry.com. Ran 39 assertions across desktop 1920, 1440, and mobile 390 viewports — all passed. Also confirmed welcome modal open/close and nav scroll behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Location.jsx computes `today` at module load time only; will not update if page stays open across midnight. Minor, non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested items verified: (1) Doctor images use classes 'w-full h-96 lg:h-[440px] object-cover object-[center_22%]' and load naturalWidth>0 at 1920/1440/390. (2) 'Areas of Expertise' text is 0 occurrences on page. (3) Hours: Mon Closed, Tue 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Wed 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Thu 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM, Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM, Sun Closed — all match. (4) New email Medicalcentre@thompsonderry.com appears in header utility bar (mailto) and Hours & Location location-email card (mailto href). Old ayubakhthar@gmail.com not found anywhere. (5) Header utility bar reads 'Mon & Sun Closed · Open Tue–Sat'. (6) Nav links present, Dr. Irma accepting badge shown, Dr. Aliya not accepting, welcome modal opens & closes via Close button, gallery has 6 items, logo loads, no broken images, footer sits at bottom of document.
verified_flows: Doctor cards: doctor-card-aliya, doctor-card-irma render with correct image classes and non-zero naturalWidth on desktop 1920, 1440 and mobile 390
Text scan: 'Areas of Expertise' count=0; 'ayubakhthar@gmail.com' count=0; 'Medicalcentre@thompsonderry.com' count>=2
Hours & Location: hours-monday..sunday all show updated times
Header utility bar: 'Mon & Sun Closed · Open Tue–Sat' + mailto:Medicalcentre@thompsonderry.com link
Nav links nav-about/services/doctor/gallery/location exist; nav-services click scrolls #services into view
Welcome modal renders on first load and closes via Close button
Logo image loaded, no broken images (naturalWidth==0 filter empty), footer bottom == document height
